case.title: TEXAS & P R CO v. LAVERTY

opinion.h: TEXAS & P R CO v. LAVERTY , 154 U.S. 520 (1894)
TEXAS & P. RY. CO. v. JAMES LAVERTY.
opinion.p: John F. Dillon and Winslow S. Pierce, for plaintiff in error.
No opinion. Dismissed, with costs, on motion of D. D. Duncan, in behalf of counsel for plaintiff in error.
